content.text: Perform root cause analysis for Color Mismatch defects based on monitoring data from last 7 days. Analysis scope: OEE Analysis disabled, Downtime Analysis disabled, Changeover Analysis disabled, Maintenance Correlation enabled. Key data: 13 Color Mismatch defects concentrated in Paint and Finish work center (Machines Pai-31, Pai-32) on 2026-07-06. Root causes identified: Process Variation (4), Machine Calibration (3), Material Defect (2), Operator Error (2), Design Issue (2). Maintenance events (Setup/Changeover, Software Updates) occurred on Paint Booth machines during 11:26-13:34 hours, with defects appearing post-maintenance. Analyze maintenance correlation, process drift patterns, and calibration loss. Provide statistical confidence and impact assessment for enabled scope areas.
